zh.Stafford, Staffordshire, England: 英國斯塔福爾斯塔福德
zh.lifeSummary: Thomas Wells是John Wells和Alice De Aston的兒子，出生在英國斯塔福爾斯塔福德。他於大約1460年與Johanna Barrington在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1498年2月9日在英國斯塔福爾提普頓。

zh-hans.Stafford, Staffordshire, England: 英国斯塔福爾斯塔福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Thomas Wells是John Wells和Alice De Aston的儿子，出生在英国斯塔福爾斯塔福德。他于大约1460年与Johanna Barrington在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1498年2月9日在英国斯塔福爾提普頓。

nameMeanings.name: Wells
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Wells next the Sea (Norfolk) or Wells (Somerset), both named with the plural of Old English wella ‘spring, stream’, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a group of springs or streams.
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dupuis   ‘from the well’.
History: One of numerous early immigrants from England bearing this name was Thomas Welles, governor of colonial CT, who was in Hartford, CT, by 1636.

variants.name: Dupuis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Jacques, Pierre, Armand, Cecile, Normand, Emile, Lucien, Marcel, Rosaire, Alphonse, Henri.
topographic name for someone ‘from the well’, from Old French puis ‘well’, with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’. Compare Dupee , Dupuie , Dupuy 2, and Wells .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Thomas Wells was born in Stafford, Staffordshire, England as the son of John Wells and Alice De Aston. He married Johanna Barrington about 1460, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 9 February 1498, in Tipton, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Thomas Wells est né à Stafford, Staffordshire, Angleterre, fils de John Wells et Alice De Aston. Il a épousé Johanna Barrington environ 1460, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 9 février 1498, à Tipton, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Thomas Wells wurde in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, als Sohn von John Wells und Alice De Aston geboren. Er hat um 1460 in England, United Kingdom Johanna Barrington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 9. Februar 1498 in Tipton, Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Thomas Wells è nato il nel Stafford, Staffordshire, England come figlio di John Wells e Alice De Aston. Lui sposato Johanna Barrington circa 1460, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 9 febbraio 1498, nel Tipton, Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas WellsはイギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォードでJohn WellsとAlice De Astonの息子として生まれた。約1460年にイギリスイギリスでJohanna Barringtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1498年2月9日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアティプトンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Wells(은)는 영국 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드에서 John Wells(와)과 Alice De Aston의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1460년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Johanna Barrington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1498년 2월 9일 영국 스태퍼드실르 티프턴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Thomas Wells nasceu em Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra filho de John Wells e Alice De Aston. Ele casou-se com Johanna Barrington aproximadamente 1460, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de fevereiro de 1498, em Tipton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Thomas Wells родился в местности стаффорд, стаффордшир, Англия. Его родителей звали John Wells и Alice De Aston. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna Barrington около 1460 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 9 февраля 1498 г. в местности типтон, стаффордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Thomas Wells nació en Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra como hijo de John Wells y Alice De Aston. Se casó con Johanna Barrington aproximadamente 1460, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de febrero de 1498, en Tipton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.
